classes.description: Base banner parent class. This defaults to a system banner style.
Container styling for banner actions including the dismiss button.
Applies to child button element within the banner to position it appropriately.
Applies an important visual style. This should be used for time-sensitive, pressing information that needs to be noticed by the user.
Pins the banner to the top of the browser window.

attributes.description: Wires up the element to the banner controller. This may be a .s-banner element or a wrapper element.
Wires up the element that is to be shown/hidden
(optional) Removes the banner from the DOM entirely when it is hidden

events.description: Fires immediately before showing the banner. Calling .preventDefault() cancels the display of the banner.
Fires after the banner has been visually shown
Fires immediately before hiding the banner. Calling .preventDefault() cancels the removal of the banner.
Fires after the banner has been visually hidden

eventDetails.description: Contains the Element that initiated the event. For instance, the button clicked to show, the element clicked outside the banner that caused it to hide, etc.

helpers.context: Element: the element the data-controller="s-banner" attribute is on
helpers.description: Helper to manually show an s-banner element via external JS

helpers.context: Element: the element the data-controller="s-banner" attribute is on
helpers.description: Helper to manually hide an s-banner element via external JS
